guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 3. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_a: Point to the big A and say: aaaaaa. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_n: Now point to the big N and say: nnnnnn.

parent_story: An ant ran on a sweet red apple. Dan saw the ant and said: Hello, little ant!
